prompt: A lone wolf howls at the moon over a snowy mountain peak.
Children fly colorful kites across a sunlit summer meadow.
A wide river flows through a dense forest at dawn.
Empty city streets glisten after a heavy autumn rain.
A baker shapes fresh dough as morning light fills the bakery.
Time-lapse of clouds crossing a wide wheat field.
A girl waits alone at a train station as cherry blossoms fall.
Friends share ramen under bright festival lanterns at night.
A small robot tends a rooftop garden in a quiet city.
A detective walks alone through a neon-lit alley in the rain.
Jazz musicians celebrate in a smoky club after a sold-out show.
A taxi drifts through empty downtown streets at three in the morning.
An abandoned house stands silent in a moonlit graveyard.
A flickering candle in a vast empty hall casts long shadows.
Fog rolls slowly across a still lake at midnight.
A father reads his daughter's last letter under a streetlamp.
A couple dances on a sunlit beach at sunset.
A glacier calves into the arctic sea under a pale sky.
A small spirit fades into the rain after saying goodbye.
A trumpet player wins the city championship under the spotlight.
